framework.name: tZero - Regulated Security Token Platform
framework.description: Overstock subsidiary tZero built a regulated trading platform for tokenized securities and physical assets, bridging traditional securities compliance with blockchain efficiency. Demonstrates hybrid approach to liquidity, compliance and transparency.
framework.raw_quote: A contrasting approach has been adopted by Overstock subsidiary tZero, which has mainly focused on tokenized offerings from the perspective of a regulated trading platform and tokenizing physical assets and securities. The tZero approach is a hybrid between customary and blockchain offerings that seek the advantages of liquidity, compliance and efficiency.
